'''Quian''' was a terrestrial<ref name="Journal4" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|63|Quian}}</ref> located in the [[Quian system/Legends|Quian system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to a [[Human/Legends|Human]] population known as the [[Quian (people)|Quians]].<ref name="Journal4" />

The Quian [[Benald Orlan]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]]<ref name="Journal4" /> at some point no earlier than [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]<ref name="Date">{{JournalCite|1|Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)}} establishes that the "[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|Wanted by Cracken]]" segment of the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' represents an [[in-universe]] update to the [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]'', the original version of which is presented in the sourcebook [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']]. The latter work is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that conflict to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the placement of the sourcebook therefore translates to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]. Furthermore, the installment of "Wanted by Cracken" in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]] establishes [[Benald Orlan]] is twenty-seven years old, meaning he must have been [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] at some point no earlier than [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]].</ref> in a family that included his Quian [[Parent/Legends|parents]], [[Karin Orlan]] and her [[Benald Orlan's father|husband]], as well as several younger siblings. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Quian was under the control of the Empire, and the Orlan family resided at a [[Orlan household|household]] there.<ref name="Journal4" />

At some point, Benald sold out his family to the local Imperial authorities and he went on to study at the off-world [[Imperial University of Marngar III]]. Quian's role in Benald's biography was eventually noted by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] in an entry of the [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]''<ref name="Journal4" />—the initial version of which was published in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]<ref name="Date" />—dedicated to Benald.<ref name="Journal4" />

==Behind the scenes==
Quian was first mentioned in the "[[Wanted by Cracken (Star Wars Adventure Journal)|Wanted by Cracken]]" segment of the [[November]] [[1994]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|fourth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. The segment was authored by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]].<ref name="Journal4" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Quian [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square L-9.<ref name="TEA" />
